data.body: FORCE_CLOSE: close gate(s) bypassed by user approval — no completion/signature attestation was signed. Reason: "All 8 children deterministically verified closed+signed children (parent_id=e59d, status=closed, signature present). The verifier's real finding (CLAUDE.md warn-only drift, Success Criterion #3) is FIXED in commit 048f378f. Its other failure (Acceptance Criterion #1, 'cannot confirm 5 children exist') is a false-negative: it searches the codebase for child aliases instead of enumerating children by parent_id, missing children not referenced in code and exhausting its step budget on larger epics. Filed as bug a254-cee4-0f18-4fcb (discovered_from this epic). Force-closing because the gate cannot run correctly due to that verifier defect, not because work is incomplete.". Session: 048f378f.
